console.heading: Console Output
console.description: Log messages printed to the developer console

file.heading: File Output
file.description: Log messages written to a file on disk

lowStock.label: Low-stock warning threshold
lowStock.hint: Warn when a tracked map material's count drops to this number or below. Default 0 warns only when you run out.

pauseInTown.label: Pause Total timer in town
pauseInTown.hint: When enabled, the Total timer freezes while you're in town so the FE/h rate reflects in-map farming throughput. Map and Seasonal trackers are unaffected. Saved sessions still record full wall-clock time.

overlay.heading: Overlay Window
overlay.opacityHint: Controls how transparent the overlay background appears

clickThrough.label: Click-through tracker while running
clickThrough.hint: When enabled, clicks pass through the overlay during an active session so you can interact with the game underneath. Pause or stop to interact with the tracker.

logPath.heading: Game Log Path
logPath.label: Torchlight Infinite Folder
logPath.hint: Select the root installation folder. The tracker will look for TorchLight\Saved\Logs\UE_game.log inside it.

itemImport.heading: Item Data
itemImport.label: Import item prices from a full_table.json file. Existing items are kept as-is.
itemImport.noneNew: No new items — all were already present.

wealthReset.heading: Wealth Chart
wealthReset.label: Clear all wealth chart history. This cannot be undone.
wealthReset.confirm: Are you sure? This will permanently delete all wealth chart data.

serperApiKey.label: Serper API Key
serperApiKey.hint: Used for item name lookup via serper.dev (max 10/day, 2500 free/month). Get a free key at serper.dev.
